source_notes: Common Amharic bound prefixes/suffixes reflected in standard reference grammars and in HornMorpho's own worked examples (e.g. definite/relative ye-, negation al-...-mm, object/possessive suffixes -u/-w/-acc*). This is a reasonable, citable starting rule set for a longest-match prefix/suffix stripper -- NOT a claim of completeness or independent expert verification.
